candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows conviction=100% but green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0%, the live signal has NO validated historical analog and must be sized down or vetoed despite apparent strength.
testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0.0: size *= 0.5  # OOD unanimity, no validated analog
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
